sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_results(
            $wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT * FROM $table WHERE user_id = %d ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 150",
                $user_id
            ),
            ARRAY_A
        )

$wpdb->get_results(
            $wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_status != 'trash'
                  AND (INSTR(post_content, %s) > 0 OR INSTR(post_content, %s) > 0 OR INSTR(post_content, %s) > 0 OR INSTR(post_content, %s) > 0)
                  AND post_type NOT IN ('revision', 'attachment')", // phpcs:ignoreFile Generic.Files.LineLength.TooLong
                'extendify-image-import',
                ' ext-import"',
                ' ext-import ',
                '"ext-import '
            )
        )

$wpdb->get_row(
            $wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT count(ID) as posts_count FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_status != 'trash'
                  AND (INSTR(post_content, %s) > 0 OR INSTR(post_content, %s) > 0 OR INSTR(post_content, %s) > 0 OR INSTR(post_content, %s) > 0)
                  AND post_type NOT IN ('revision', 'attachment')", // phpcs:ignoreFile Generic.Files.LineLength.TooLong
                'extendify-image-import',
                ' ext-import"',
                ' ext-import ',
                '"ext-import '
            )
        )

$wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            'SELECT CREATE_TIME
            FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES
            WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = %s
            AND TABLE_NAME = %s
            LIMIT 1',
            $wpdb->dbname,
            $wpdb->posts
        ))

wp_remote_post(Constants::AI_HOST . '/api/plugins/woo/content', [
            'headers' => [
                'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
                'referer' => get_bloginfo('url'),
            ],
            'body' => wp_json_encode([
                'wpLanguage' => get_locale(),
                'siteProfile' => get_option('extendify_site_profile', []),
                'siteId' => get_option('extendify_site_id'),
                'version' => Config::$version,
                'title' => get_bloginfo('name'),
                'wpVersion' => get_bloginfo('version'),
                'partnerId' => PartnerData::$id,
                'devbuild' => constant('EXTENDIFY_DEVMODE'),
            ]),
        ])

        ])

            LIMIT 1',

            $wpdb->posts

fwrite(
                STDERR,
                "extendify-sdk tests require $label at $entrypoint.\n"
                . "Install it under WP_CONTENT_DIR/plugins/ or set "
                . "EXTENDIFY_TEST_SKIP_OPTIONAL_PLUGINS=1 to skip the "
                . "WooCommerce + WPForms test paths.\n"
            )

sanitizers.expression:
$wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT * FROM $table WHERE user_id = %d ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 150",
                $user_id
            )

$wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT event_id FROM $table WHERE user_id = %d ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1",
                $user_id
            )

$wpdb->prepare(
            "INSERT INTO $table (created_at, event_id, type, details, user_id)
            VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %d)
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                created_at = VALUES(created_at),
                type = VALUES(type),
                details = VALUES(details)",
            $created_at,
            $event_id,
            $type,
            $details,
            $user_id
        )

$wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_status != 'trash'
                  AND (INSTR(post_content, %s) > 0 OR INSTR(post_content, %s) > 0 OR INSTR(post_content, %s) > 0 OR INSTR(post_content, %s) > 0)
                  AND post_type NOT IN ('revision', 'attachment')", // phpcs:ignoreFile Generic.Files.LineLength.TooLong
                'extendify-image-import',
                ' ext-import"',
                ' ext-import ',
                '"ext-import '
            )

$wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT count(ID) as posts_count FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_status != 'trash'
                  AND (INSTR(post_content, %s) > 0 OR INSTR(post_content, %s) > 0 OR INSTR(post_content, %s) > 0 OR INSTR(post_content, %s) > 0)
                  AND post_type NOT IN ('revision', 'attachment')", // phpcs:ignoreFile Generic.Files.LineLength.TooLong
                'extendify-image-import',
                ' ext-import"',
                ' ext-import ',
                '"ext-import '
            )

$wpdb->prepare(
            'SELECT CREATE_TIME
            FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES
            WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = %s
            AND TABLE_NAME = %s
            LIMIT 1',
            $wpdb->dbname,
            $wpdb->posts
        )
